Loreza Sand
Art by Beelphazoar ©
Alias Loree[1]
Allegiance House Martell
Culture Dornishmen
Born 293 AC[2] (age 7)
Father Prince Oberyn Martell
Mother Ellaria Sand
Books
  • A Storm of Swords (appendix)
  • A Feast for Crows (mentioned)
  • A Dance with Dragons (mentioned)
  • The Winds of Winter (mentioned)

Loreza Sand is the youngest bastard daughter of Prince Oberyn Martell and his longtime paramour, Ellaria Sand. She and her sisters are known as the Sand Snakes.[3]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance and Character
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Feast for Crows
    • 2.2 The Winds of Winter
  • 3 Quotes about Loreza
  • 4 Family
  • 5 References

Appearance and Character[ ]

Loreza idolizes her older sisters, Elia Sand and Obella Sand.[1]

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

After the death of her father, Prince Oberyn Martell, Loreza's uncle Doran Martell places her and all her elder sisters into custody out of concern for their reactions to their father's death at the hands of Gregor Clegane, despite Loreza being only six years old at the time.[4]

The Winds of Winter[ ]

 Warning
This information has thus far been released in a sample chapter for The Winds of Winter, and might therefore not be in finalized form. Keep in mind that the content as described below is still subject to change.

Loreza has just turned seven and is accompanying her mother to Hellholt, seat of Loreza's grandfather, Lord Harmen Uller.[5]

Quotes about Loreza[ ]

Loreza is six. Dorea is eight. What wars could they foment? What wars could they foment? Yet my father has imprisoned them with their sisters.[4]

—Arianne Martell to Arys Oakheart

I have four daughters, I remind you. Your sisters. My Elia is fourteen, almost a woman. Obella is twelve, on the brink of maidenhood. They worship you, as Dorea and Loreza worship them. If you should die, must El and Obella seek vengeance for you, then Dorea and Loree for them? Is that how it goes, round and round forever?[1]

—Ellaria Sand to Oberyn Martell's three oldest daughters
